response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows for capital markets/fixed income systems. While they have C/C++ exposure from early in their career, it does not meet the 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ development specified in the role. Additionally, their recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with no clear domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets systems.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with SQL and databases (MongoDB, MySQL)
Demonstrated ability to work in agile teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (recent focus on TypeScript/Node.js)
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
No clear evidence of working with critical systems in capital markets environments
